## Definition

**Property-Based Testing** (基于性质的测试) — a testing paradigm that specifies general properties relating inputs and outputs, then checks them across many automatically generated cases.

## Key Points

- [[allamanis-2024-unsupervised-2402-08699]] explicitly draws RTC from the round-trip property used in property-based testing.
- The paper repurposes that software-testing intuition for model evaluation rather than program verification.
- Round-trip correctness is treated as a property that should hold between original and reconstructed code artifacts.
- This framing motivates evaluation without enumerating many human-authored benchmark examples.
